description:
The quiz assesses practical CSS knowledge, testing familiarity with modern styling techniques and the ability to articulate CSS expertise on a résumé. It is positioned as a light‑hearted, multiple‑choice format aimed at beginners to intermediate learners, with a friendly, encouraging tone.
Topics: Modern CSS features, Responsive design, CSS syntax and selectors, Best practices for styling, Resume wording for CSS skills
Audience: Aspiring front‑end developers, junior web designers, and anyone looking to validate and showcase their CSS proficiency.
